category_sources: source_facts.description says fstrm is a Frame Streams implementation in C; official API docs describe it as a C implementation of the Frame Streams data transport protocol.
docs_sources: Official fstrm GitHub Pages site is API documentation and links to the project hosting repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL; official API docs also identify this GitHub URL as the project hosting site.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official API docs describe a C Frame Streams data transport library.
